council_result: S125 Full 3-way Council R1+R2 (GROK-DISRUPTOR grok-4.20-0309-reasoning + GEMINI-AUDITOR gemini-3.1-pro-preview) + PRIME-AUDIT. R1 surfaced 7 findings; code-triage: transport disconnect->reconnect race (Grok CRIT/Gemini HIGH) REFUTED by S82 shipped precedent (identical sync pattern, reconnect.spec.ts) + old host transport handlers self-gate inert; ClientSync-reuse contamination (Gemini MED) FALSE PREMISE (original host never had a ClientSync) - hardened anyway with explicit clientSync=null; 'permanent demotion' cascade (Grok HIGH) REFUTED (seat 0 warrant-excluded, computeClaimDelayMs->null, follows as plain client via stored warrant). ADOPTED: unify demoteToClient(newEpoch, winner, {reestablishTransport}) (kills duplication), transient overlay via existing D4/S82 state-machine (no terminal latch), rate 90/40 + intentThrottled type-log (two-bucket QoS = documented v2 lever), cascade e2e + burst/isolation/forget-reset units + real-WebRTC rejoin e2e. R2: all resolutions HOLD, ZERO residual HIGH/CRITICAL, cleared. PRIME-AUDIT: no CRITICAL survived (15th instance external high-sev dies on exact mechanics); runtime-verified via real-WebRTC e2e; successor peer-join claim-echo re-teaches the rejoiner for free.

priorities.label: Host-migration v2: deposed ORIGINAL host auto-rejoins as client (epoch demotion path) instead of the v1 terminal overlay. Unify demoteToClient(newEpoch, winner, {reestablishTransport}); reestablish=true nulls clientSync + disconnect + connectAsClient + setEpoch; wire onDeposed to pass the successor; remove terminal zombie latch for this path (existing D4/S82 overlay owns display incl. cascade); roomCode-null fail-safe -> v1 terminal. NO protocol bump. Unit (hostmigV2.test.ts) + real-WebRTC rejoin e2e + cascade test.

F9: per-peer INTENT token-bucket (trust hardening, pre-public-matchmaking). New pure src/net/intentRateLimiter.ts (capacity 90 / refill 40/s), wired at TOP of BOTH host INTENT handlers before allowlist/stamp; drop + world.diagnostics.intentThrottled++ (log dropped type) when empty; forget(peer) on leave + reset() at match boundary. Wall-clock (host-only guard, determinism-neutral). NO protocol bump. Unit (intentRateLimiter.test.ts) + flood-vs-legit integration.
